item.title: Allergens (full list)
item.description: Allergens: 1. Gluten 2. Eggs 3. Fish 4. Peanuts 5. Crustaceans 6. Milk 7. Soy 8. Sesame 9. Nuts 10. Celery 11. Mustard 12. Lupine 13. Sulphur dioxide 14. Molluscs 15. Garlic

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu: Classic, hearty hash with tender meat and vegetables, topped with a crispy fried egg and fresh chives. Served with pickled beetroot and bearnaise creme. (2+11)

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu: Menudo. Spiced pork stew from the Philippines in a deep umami sauce, served with jasmine rice and spring onions. Served with ensaladong talong. (7+8+15) GREEN DISH: Menudo. Spiced stew with crispy tofu and chickpeas in a deep umami sauce, served with jasmine rice and spring onions. Served with ensaladong talong. (7+8+15) A selection of fresh seasonal vegetables that you can combine with a protein of your choice to create your own meal salad.

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu: Black pepper chicken with caramelized potatoes and crispy puff pastry top, scattered with parsley and fresh cress. Served with burnt cabbage salad with agave-mustard dressing. (1+2+6+11) GREEN DISH: dish Black pepper tofu with caramelized potatoes and crispy puff pastry top, scattered with parsley and fresh cress. Served with burnt cabbage salad with agave-mustard dressing. (1+2+6+11)

item.title: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu: Penne à la ragout with tender beef chuck, topped with parmesan and fresh basil. (1+6+10+15) GREEN DISH: dish Penne à la ragout with rich tomato sauce and black lentils, topped with parmesan and fresh basil. (1+6+10+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu: Roast pork loin with crispy crackling, served with a fresh green summer potato salad with chervil, parsley, radishes and asparagus. (11+13) GREEN DISH: dish Salt-baked celeriac, served with a fresh green summer potato salad with chervil, parsley, radishes and asparagus. (10+11+13)

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu: Beer-braised chipotle carnitas of tender pork shoulder and vegetables, served with Mexican red rice and topped with crispy elote. Served with fresh lime cabbage salad and pico de gallo. (1+6+15) GREEN DISH: Dish Beer-braised chipotle oyster mushrooms and vegetables, served with Mexican red rice and topped with crispy elote. Served with fresh lime cabbage salad and pico de gallo. (1+6+15)
